/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_lsp_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_lsp_server.dir/tests/test_lsp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_lsp_server.dir/src/lsp_protocol.cpp.o -o test_lsp_server  libcomal_lsp.a ../libcomal-runtime/libcomal-runtime.a ../libcomal-parser/libcomal-parser.a ../libcomal-sound/libcomal-sound.a -lfluidsynth /usr/lib64/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3 ../libcomal-graphics/libcomal-graphics.a
